title: 12 hour shifts no problem
review_text: I'm a nurse and on my feet 12 hours a day. These are the most comfortable work shoes I've owned. Arch support is noticeably better than the Runner 2.

title: Not a running shoe
review_text: Bought these thinking I could run in them. They're walking shoes. Great for walking and standing all day but not enough cushion response for running. Love them for what they are.
